promptTavily: SpaceX Starship next test flight launch date 2026
promptZAI:
You monitor SpaceX Starship test flights.

Today is {{DATA_HOJE}}.
Previously known: launch_status={{LAUNCH_STATUS}}, launch_date={{LAUNCH_DATE}}.

New update:
{{TAVILY_ANSWER}}

Tasks:
1. Write a short push notification title (max 60 characters) summarizing the key news.
2. Extract the launch status of the next Starship test flight:
   - "scheduled" if a future date is mentioned
   - "launched" if the flight already occurred (its date is before today)
   - "scrubbed" if the attempt was cancelled
   - "unknown" if unclear
3. Extract the scheduled launch date (YYYY-MM-DD). If only a month is given (e.g. "July 2026"), use the 1st ("2026-07-01"). Use null if unknown.

Respond ONLY with valid JSON, no text before or after:
{"title": "...", "launch_status": "...", "launch_date": "YYYY-MM-DD or null"}
